description: Technical debt tracking for ResumeAI codebase

code_quality.name: Code Quality
code_quality.description: Issues related to code structure, readability, and maintainability

architecture.name: Architecture
architecture.description: Structural improvements needed in the codebase

dependencies.name: Dependencies
dependencies.description: Outdated packages, security vulnerabilities, or dependency issues

testing.name: Testing
testing.description: Test coverage gaps, testing infrastructure improvements

high.name: High
high.description: Should be addressed in current sprint

medium.name: Medium
medium.description: Should be addressed in next few sprints

low.name: Low
low.description: Can be addressed when time permits

debtItems.title: Implement Stripe Integration for Billing
debtItems.description: The StripeService class in lib/stripe.py contains 13 TODO items for implementing Stripe API integration. Currently all methods return placeholder/hardcoded values. This blocks the billing functionality from being enabled (BILLING_ENABLED = false).

debtItems.title: Implement Resume Comment CRUD Operations
debtItems.description: Team collaboration routes in team_routes.py have 4 TODO items for implementing database operations for resume comments. The endpoints (add, list, update, delete comments) currently raise HTTPException with 404 instead of performing actual database operations.

debtItems.title: Implement Database Migration Validation
debtItems.description: The DeploymentValidator.validate_migrations() method in config/health.py has a TODO to implement actual migration validation. Currently it always returns true without checking if database migrations have been applied.

debtItems.title: Implement Stripe Webhook Verification
debtItems.description: The verify_webhook_signature() method in StripeService currently parses payload without actual signature verification. This is a security risk as webhook events could be spoofed.

debtItems.title: Implement Usage Tracking System
debtItems.description: The check_usage_limits() method in StripeService has a TODO to implement database usage tracking. Currently it always returns allowed=true without tracking actual usage, which could allow users to exceed their plan limits.

debtItems.title: Implement Stripe Customer Management
debtItems.description: The create_or_get_customer() and set_default_payment_method() methods in StripeService return placeholder values instead of actually creating Stripe customers. This blocks customer onboarding flow.

debtItems.title: Implement Stripe Checkout Session Creation
debtItems.description: The create_checkout_session() method returns a hardcoded test session ID instead of creating actual Stripe checkout sessions. This prevents users from subscribing to paid plans.

debtItems.title: Implement Stripe Subscription Management
debtItems.description: Multiple subscription-related methods (cancel_subscription, resume_subscription, update_subscription_plan) return placeholder values. Users cannot manage their subscriptions.

debtItems.title: Implement Stripe Payment Method Management
debtItems.description: Payment method methods (attach_payment_method, detach_payment_method) return placeholder values. Users cannot add or remove payment methods from their accounts.

debtItems.title: Implement Stripe Billing Portal
debtItems.description: The create_portal_session() method returns a hardcoded test URL instead of creating actual Stripe billing portal sessions for customer self-service.

debtItems.title: Implement Stripe Prices API Integration
debtItems.description: The get_available_plans() method returns hardcoded plan data instead of fetching from Stripe Prices API. This means plan changes require code deployment instead of being managed via Stripe dashboard.

debtItems.title: Development Mode Security Warning
debtItems.description: In development mode, a temporary secret is generated with a warning. This is acceptable for development but the warning message and temporary secret generation logic should be reviewed to ensure it cannot leak to production.

debtItems.title: Add Integration Tests for Team Collaboration
debtItems.description: The team collaboration endpoints (resume comments) are not implemented, so there are no integration tests for this functionality. Tests need to be added once the endpoints are implemented.

debtItems.title: Add Integration Tests for Stripe Service
debtItems.description: The StripeService methods are not fully tested with integration tests. Once Stripe integration is implemented, comprehensive tests should be added to verify all payment flows.

debtItems.title: Document Billing API Endpoints
debtItems.description: Once Stripe integration is complete, the billing API endpoints need comprehensive documentation including request/response examples, error codes, and rate limiting information.

debtItems.title: Document Team Collaboration API
debtItems.description: The team collaboration endpoints need API documentation once implemented, including authentication requirements, rate limits, and example requests/responses.
